title: Moroccan Khlea Stuffed Olives
description: A unique twist on traditional stuffed olives, with the rich flavors of Moroccan khlea. This recipe combines the crunch of intricate crispy elements with the savory flavor of black olives.
instructions: Pit the black olives and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the khlea, Moroccan spice mix, salt, and black pepper.
Stuff each olive with a small amount of the khlea mixture.
Top each stuffed olive with a piece of intricately crispy elements.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of each olive.
Place the stuffed olives on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the olives are heated through and the crispy elements are golden brown.
Serve warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
